articles.title: FAA is turning to AI to reduce the number of close calls between planes at the nation’s airports
articles.description: Federal Aviation Administration reportedly inks deal with Palantir to analyze incident data
articles.content:
The Federal Aviation Administration is spending nearly $4 million on an artificial intelligence initiative to reduce close calls on airport runways as recent incidents have sparked fears among fliers.

articles.title: Bitcoin miner Bitdeer mined 921 BTC, but its smaller stash raises a bigger question
articles.description: The Bitcoin miner's AI cloud growth may reduce sell pressure, but May data shows Bitcoin retention still lagging.
articles.content:
Bitdeer's latest operating update has revealed a concrete insight into the recent Bitcoin miner-AI pivot: the company produced far more Bitcoin but ended the month with far fewer coins than it held a year earlier.
The company reported 921 BTC mined i... [8002 chars]

articles.title: The Sashimi robot is real and it doesn’t fumble at slicing and dicing
articles.description: A Norwegian research team built a robot that can slice and serve salmon sashimi using three arms, AI training, and a tactile sensor that knows when the blade hits the board.
articles.content:
Robots can pick up boxes, sort packages, and screw in bolts without breaking a sweat. Some of them can even walk and run like humans. Hand one a floppy, slippery piece of raw salmon, though, and everything starts falling apart.
A team at the Norwegia... [1621 chars]

articles.description: Tunisia’s fighting spirit under new coach Herve Renard will be tested against Japan’s technical quality and tactical discipline led by Hajime Moriyasu. The Blue Samurai enter as favourites after a solid start. I asked ChatGPT who’d win Tunisia vs Japan.

articles.title: S’pore man targeted by former schoolmate who posted AI images of them as couple with baby
articles.description: Checks on June 15 found that the woman's Instagram account had been deactivated. Read more at straitstimes.com.
articles.content:

articles.description: "These are not your friends. These are not conscious beings. These are not sentient interlocutors.”

articles.title: People are marrying holograms and making friends with chatbots. But can AI bring true happiness?
articles.description: Can technology really replace human relationships? As philosophy scholars who focus on human happiness and on artificial intelligence (AI), we tackle this question in a recent paper.
